title: Galileo Financial Technology Platform | Banking, Fintech, APIs
full_text:
Expanding the financial frontier with
We help banks, fintechs and brands build and scale modern financial products and experiences. Our cloud-native, developer-friendly and regulation-ready financial technology platform reinvents the way people interact with their money with secure and scalable APIs.
Let's Talk
The world's most innovative companies choose Galileo.
Financial technology platform
One platform, endless solutions.
Invent, build, launch, and scale your own unique financial services with our proven platform that’s secure and compliant from the ground up. Deliver seamless, modern banking experiences above the glass—from intuitive apps to embedded finance solutions—while we enable everything below the glass with a fully integrated, multi-product infrastructure.
Explore Our Platform
Galileo named Best-in-Class for digital issuance.
Galileo earned the top spot in Javelin Strategy & Research’s 2025 Digital Issuance Provider Scorecard, recognized for its flexible, secure, and API-first platform.
Learn More
Our Track Record
Galileo at a glance.
Best-In-Class Platform Partners
Accounts
Decades of Experience
Team Members
Supported Countries
OUR PEOPLE
What can we achieve together?
We've spent 20+ years tackling financial technology challenges with early-stage start ups, emerging companies and established brands to launch and scale innovative payment processing and digital banking programs. No matter how you want to invent the financial experience, we're with you on the journey, so you can think boldly and deliver big.
Deposits
Solutions for modernizing deposits, back-end core infrastructure and cloud-native migrations.
Learn More
Engagement Channels
Solutions to modernize digital banking, featuring AI-powered tools, self-service options, and digital engagement channels for seamless customer interactions.
Learn More
Payments & Cards
Comprehensive products and services for card issuing, payment hub and program management. Including customer support and dispute resolution.
Learn More
Lending
Integrated support for card issuing, payment processing, credit, analytics and risk so your program can reach its goals.
Learn More
Risk
Advanced tools for payment risk management, instant verification, and comprehensive fraud operations support.
Learn More
Platform
A cloud-based, developer-friendly, and regulation-ready solution with open APIs, sandbox testing, and trusted partnerships to serve financial institutions, fintechs, and brands.
Learn More
Cyberbank Core
Cyberbank Digital
Card Issuing
Payment Hub
Secured Credit
Payment Risk Platform
One platform, tailored experiences.
Whether your business is retail, SME, corporate or payments, Cyberbank can help you kick-start your digital banking transformation or startup project in as little as three months.
Contact Sales
A next-generation, cloud-native platform designed to accelerate innovation, enhance customer experiences and boost operational efficiency.
Explore Cyberbank Core
A cloud-native, composable, microservices-driven platform designed to help companies build innovative, user-centric financial experiences.
Explore Cyberbank Digital
Card issuing includes issuing physical, virtual and digital-first cards, which are essential to cardholder activation and retention.
Explore Cards
Seamless and secure transactional experiences are the baseline for payment processing and money transfers today.
Explore Payment Hub
Helping consumers and businesses achieve their financial goals requires adaptable credit and lending programs that fit their unique, evolving needs.
Explore Secured Credit
Payment fraud is complicated, and card detection can be tricky. But we're here to help you with proactive risk and compliance management.
Explore Payment Risk Platform
FIND OUT WHAT'S POSSIBLE WITH GALILEO
Start expanding your financial frontier.
Accelerate your path to putting best-in-class financial products and experiences in your customers’ hands.
Contact Sales
© Galileo Financial Technologies, LLC 2026
English
